name: Suspicious Named Pipes Detected
description: Detection of suspicious named pipes. Adversaries often use named pipes for inter-process communication, a technique that can be leveraged for process injection, privilege escalation, or lateral movement. This is a common defense evasion technique.

prompts.prompt: A critical alert has been triggered on the host **{host}**: a suspicious named pipe, **{pipe}**, was detected. This is a strong indicator of an adversary attempting **Process Injection** or **Privilege Escalation** (**MITRE ATT&CK T1055**) by using a named pipe for inter-process communication. Immediate investigation is required to determine the legitimacy of this action and to remove the malicious process. The event occurred with Event ID **{event_id}**.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The name of the host where the event occurred.

parameters.name: pipe
parameters.description: The name of the suspicious named pipe that was detected.
